SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression

Class Operator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression.Operator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
AllFields, AllObjects, Assignment, BinaryNot, BinaryOperator, ComparativeOperator, Conditional, DLEmbeddedExpression, LogicalAnd, LogicalNot, LogicalOr, Negative, ParenthesizedExpression, Positive, SeqGet, SeqIndexOf, SeqLength, SeqPut, SeqReverse, SeqSingleton, SeqSub, ShiftLeft, ShiftRight, Singleton, TypeOperator, UnsignedShiftRight
public abstract class Operator extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement implements Expression, ExpressionContainer
Operator base class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Operator

      protected Operator()

    • Operator

      protected Operator(Expression lhs, Expression rhs)
      Operator.
      Parameters:
      lhs - an expression.
      rhs - an expression.

    • Operator

      protected Operator(ExtList children)
      Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.
      Parameters:
      children - the children of this AST element as KeY classes. In this case the order of the children is IMPORTANT. May contain: 2 of Expression (the first Expression as left hand side, the second as right hand side), Comments

    • Operator

      protected Operator(Expression unaryChild)
      Operator.
      Parameters:
      unaryChild - an expression.

    • Operator

      protected Operator(Expression[] arguments)
      Operator.
      Parameters:
      arguments - an array of expression.

    • Operator

      public Operator(PositionInfo pi, List<Comment> comments, ImmutableArray<Expression> children)

    • Operator

      public Operator(PositionInfo pi, List<Comment> c, Expression lhs, Expression rhs)

  • Method Details

    • getArity

      public abstract int getArity()
      getArity() == getASTchildren().size()

    • getPrecedence

      public abstract int getPrecedence()
      0 is the "highest" precedence (obtained by parantheses), 13 the "lowest".

    • precedes

      public static boolean precedes(Operator a, Operator b)
      Returns:
      true, if a has a higher priority (a lower precendence value) than b.

    • getNotation

      public abstract int getNotation()
      Returns:
      INFIX, PREFIX, or POSTFIX.

    • isLeftAssociative

      public boolean isLeftAssociative()
      Checks if this operator is left or right associative. The associativity defines the order in which the arguments are evaluated (left-to-right or right-to-left). The default is left associative. Unary operators, assignments and conditionals are right associative.
      Returns:
      true, if the operator is left associative, false otherwise.

    • getFirstElement

      public SourceElement getFirstElement()
      Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getFirstElement in class JavaSourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • JavaSourceElement.toSource()
      • JavaSourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • getFirstElementIncludingBlocks

      public SourceElement getFirstElementIncludingBlocks()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in class JavaSourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • SourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • getLastElement

      public SourceElement getLastElement()
      Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs last in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getLastElement in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getLastElement in class JavaSourceElement
      Returns:
      the last source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • JavaSourceElement.toSource()
      • JavaSourceElement.getEndPosition()

    • getChildCount

      public int getChildCount()
      Returns the number of children of this node.
      Specified by:
      getChildCount in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Specified by:
      getChildCount in interface SyntaxElement
      Returns:
      an int giving the number of children of this node

    • getChildAt

      public ProgramElement getChildAt(int index)
      Returns the child at the specified index in this node's "virtual" child array
      Specified by:
      getChildAt in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      index - an index into this node's "virtual" child array
      Returns:
      the program element at the given position
      Throws:
      ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds

      Get the number of expressions in this container.

      Returns:
